name: plate-editor-evidence
description: Evidence Kit lab for editor framework benchmark research.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.mjs && node --check test/fuzz/core-fuzz.mjs && node --check benchmarks/core-benchmark.mjs && node --check benchmarks/slate-v2-legacy-benchmark.mjs && node --check benchmarks/rich-text-editors-benchmark.mjs && node --check benchmarks/benchmark-health.mjs && node --check benchmarks/render-rich-text-viewer.mjs && node --check benchmarks/render-perf-index.mjs && node --check benchmarks/startup-import.mjs && node --check benchmarks/package-boundary-gates.mjs && node --check benchmarks/fetch-editor-frameworks-research.mjs && node --check benchmarks/fetch-source-pass-research.mjs && npm run evidence:full
scripts.bench:evidence: node benchmarks/core-benchmark.mjs --out benchmarks/results/core-latest.json && node benchmarks/slate-v2-legacy-benchmark.mjs --check --out benchmarks/results/slate-v2-legacy-latest.json && node benchmarks/rich-text-editors-benchmark.mjs --check --out benchmarks/results/rich-text-editors-latest.json && node benchmarks/startup-import.mjs --check --out benchmarks/results/startup-import-latest.json --p95Ms 100 --exports 32 && npm run evidence:health
scripts.evidence:refresh: npm run research:list && npm run bench:rich-text:check && npm run evidence:health && npm run docs:perf
scripts.docs:perf: evidence-kit docs && npm run docs:rich-text && npm run evidence:health && npm run docs:index
scripts.docs:perf:check: evidence-kit docs && npm run docs:rich-text:check && npm run evidence:health && npm run docs:index && npm run docs:index:check
scripts.evidence:full: npm run test:evidence && npm run fuzz && npm run bench:evidence && npm run bench:startup:check && npm run bench:package:gates && npm run bench:scope && npm run docs:perf && npm run docs:perf:check && npm run research:list
